title: Mission Control Quad Pane
prompt:
Create a polished dark-mode product UI mockup for "NEXUS Workflow Brain - Mission Control Quad Pane". 16:9 desktop screenshot, high-density engineering interface, not a landing page.
Layout: left workflow outline rail with nested nodes and validation badges; large center node graph canvas with input, LLM, image model, artifact output, merge nodes; right brain panel showing situational brief, topology explanation, risks, optimization proposal; bottom ask-brain composer with mode selector.
Visual style: restrained dark graphite grid, small radius panels, crisp thin borders, soft green/cyan status accents, readable typography, professional AI ops cockpit, no decorative blobs, no oversized hero text.
Include realistic UI labels: Workflow, Contract, Runtime Evidence, Brain Summary, Ask Brain, Missing Capabilities, Proposal Diff.

Rendering requirements: Generate a crisp browser-app UI concept mockup, landscape composition, no fake browser chrome, no illegible tiny lorem ipsum, make labels readable, align panels carefully, professional product design artifact for a technical architecture report.
